outlook_paragraph: Continental Resources shows moderate drilling activity with 13 active sites at decision date, 4.8% above recent trends, driven by 4 newly active pads. With WTI averaging around $44/bbl and realized prices at a discount of $10/boe, revenue is supported by stable operational performance in core areas. However, only 40% segment exposure limits full commodity upside. The deterministic forecast for Q3 2021 is set at $659.3M, reflecting balanced activity and mid-tier pricing conditions.
